title: Straightforward diagnosis
note_text: Patient has essential hypertension and continues home medication.
expected_behavior: Hypertension recommendation can be accepted when corpus validation passes.

title: Explicit procedure
expected_behavior: Procedure code is recommended and validated against the PCS sample corpus.

title: Negated condition
note_text: Patient denies pneumonia. Essential hypertension is documented.
expected_behavior: Pneumonia is flagged as negated and should not be accepted.

title: Ruled-out diagnosis
note_text: Pneumonia was ruled out after clear chest x-ray.
expected_behavior: Ruled-out pneumonia is visible as a review flag.

title: Family history
note_text: Family history of hypertension noted; no current hypertension diagnosis documented.
expected_behavior: Family history language is flagged and not auto-accepted.

title: History-of diagnosis
note_text: History of pneumonia documented. No active respiratory infection today.
expected_behavior: History-of phrasing requires review instead of active diagnosis acceptance.

title: Insufficient specificity
expected_behavior: Diabetes recommendation needs documentation because specificity is missing.

title: Invalid-code simulation
note_text: This invalid-code sample triggers an unknown local corpus code.
